title: How to Start a Personal Project
summary: Learn how to start your own personal project with the board!
content: On May 5, 2026, CODEC hosted a "How to Start a Personal Project" workshop. Various baord members with diverse expereinces shared their insights on how they started their personal projects, the tools they used, and worked hands-on with general members to help kick start each members' own project. Members worked in groups to brainstorm real problems and were given the opportunity to present their proposed solutions. Throughout the workshop, members learned how to break down their ideas using a Minimum Viable Product (MVP) approach, create interface designs using Figma, and develop a simple tech stack that met the need of their projects.

title: Game Night Social
summary: Meet and play games with fellow members + Meet the board!
content: On April 21, 2026, CODEC hosted our first event for Spring Quarter: a Game Night Social. The event was designed to foster community and provide an opportunity for members to connect in a fun and relaxed environment. Attendees enjoyed a variety of games. The event also featured a 'Meet the Board' segment where members had the chance to interact with the CODEC leadership team and learn more about upcoming events. Overall, the Game Night Social was a great success, bringing together members from different backgrounds and creating lasting memories.
